parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'page', title: $('Parse Outcomes').item.json.pageTitle, space: { key: $('Parse Outcomes').item.json.confluenceSpace }, ancestors: $json.results && $json.results.length > 0 ? [{ id: String($json.results[0].id) }] : [], body: { storage: { value: $('Parse Outcomes').item.json.pageBody, representation: 'storage' } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { project: { key: $('Parse Outcomes').item.json.jiraProject }, summary: `[Meeting] ${$('Parse Outcomes').item.json.topic.substring(0, 230)}`, description: { type: 'doc', version: 1, content: [{ type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Meeting Topic: ${$('Parse Outcomes').item.json.topic}` }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Participants: ${$('Parse Outcomes').item.json.agents.join(', ')}` }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Date: ${$('Parse Outcomes').item.json.dateStr} ${$('Parse Outcomes').item.json.timeStr} | Meeting ID: ${$('Parse Outcomes').item.json.meetingId}` }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Action Items: ${$('Parse Outcomes').item.json.actionItems.length}` }] }] }, issuetype: { name: 'Story' }, priority: { id: $('Parse Outcomes').item.json.parentPriorityId }, labels: ['meeting-action'] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { project: { key: $json.jiraProject }, parent: { key: $json.parentKey }, summary: $json.shortTask, description: { type: 'doc', version: 1, content: [{ type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Task: ${$json.task}` }] }, { type: 'paragraph', content: [{ type: 'text', text: `Owner: ${$json.owner} | Priority: ${$json.priority}` }] }] }, issuetype: { name: 'Subtask' }, priority: { id: $json.jiraPriorityId }, labels: $json.labels } }) }}
